title: APM: Suspicious JavaScript Execution Patterns
description: Detects suspicious JavaScript patterns in browser telemetry indicating crypto mining, keylogging, formjacking, or other malicious client-side scripts captured by OpenTelemetry.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and ('HTTP URL' like '%coinhive%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%cryptonight%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%coin-hive%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%minero.cc%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%jsecoin%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%cryptoloot%') | stats count as Detections by 'HTTP URL', 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'service.name' | sort -Detections
